arts.sum: Dusan Vlahovic's future at Juventus hangs by a thread after Paris Saint-Germain loanee Randal Kolo Muani enjoyed a dream start to life in Serie A. The French center-forward has quickly dislodged the Serbia international from Thiago Motta's starting lineup, casting doubt on his long-term prospects at the Allianz Stadium.
